definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Do you have a recommendation?]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: A suggestion or proposal as to the best course of action.
